# OAuthValues.OfflineAccessScope field

The reserved scope a client adds to request a refresh token, when (and only when) the authorization-server metadata advertises it (R-23.9-b). An MCP server SHOULD NOT advertise it (R-23.9-g).

```csharp
public const string OfflineAccessScope;
```
